description: Style Note ADIDAS deodorants come with the promise of long lasting fragrance and patented Cool Spray technology which provides immediate cooling sensation and also gets reactivated at the very hint of moisture. Keeping you cool and fresh all day while making you smell good all day, this is a must have for those day out in the sun. The bottle has a cap free actuator which makes it easy to pull out and spray. Product Details ADIDAS's Victory League comes in an aerosol spray canister and has a fresh oriental fragrance Caution Do not use near fire, flame or heat Avoid spraying in eyes Size 150 ml
